bird.name: 紅額亞馬遜鸚鵡
bird.summary: 红眉鹦哥（學名：Amazona rhodocorytha，台湾作紅額亞馬遜鸚鵡），又稱為紅頂亞馬遜鸚鵡、紅眉亞馬遜鸚鵡或紅額鸚鵡，為一種瀕臨絕種的鸚鵡，目前列於CITES一級的種物。 這種鸚鵡只分佈於巴西的東南方，由於棲地遭破壞，以及人類濫捕，紅額亞馬遜鸚鵡己成為中南美洲，數目…

relations.subject: 紅額亞馬遜鸚鵡
relations.evidence: It is threatened both by habitat loss and by being captured for the trade in wild parrots
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: 紅額亞馬遜鸚鵡
relations.evidence: Another threat is the illegal collection of young birds for the international pet trade. This bird is present in several wildlife reserves but is not effectively protected against poaching even there
relations.object_summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。
